demoDisclaimer.body: This calibration is currently running in demonstration mode. All measurements and calculations are simulated for testing purposes only.

flow.toastProcessingError: Error processing calibration data. Please try again.

setup.title: Device Calibration Setup
setup.intro: This calibration process will help ensure accurate device measurements. You'll need:
setup.bulletReferences: • Known reference values for each calibration card

gain.title: Gain Calibration (Auto-blanking)
gain.body: The device will now perform auto-blanking to establish baseline readings for each LED channel.

processing.title: Processing Calibration Data
processing.subtitle: Analyzing measurement data and calculating calibration parameters...
processing.cardBody: Please wait while we process your calibration data

completion.title: Calibration Complete!
completion.subtitle: Your MultispeQ device has been successfully calibrated and is ready for measurements.
